summary: Defines the bounded appendix envelope emitted by source-bucket lane-watch and working-post runs so root-side report consumption can preserve continuity without treating every hourly emission as a permanent thread or inheritance surface.

fieldDefinitions.appendixId: Stable appendix emission identifier for one bounded hourly report.
fieldDefinitions.bucketLabel: Named source-bucket owner of the report appendix.
fieldDefinitions.laneKey: Bucket-local lane identity such as lane-watch or working-post.
fieldDefinitions.subjectKey: The active subject identity carried by the appendix.
fieldDefinitions.continuityKey: The continuity-bearing key reused while subject identity and discourse office remain stable.
fieldDefinitions.reportClass: Bounded class for the appendix: lane_watch or working_post.
fieldDefinitions.discourseOffice: Current office class for continuity resolution.
fieldDefinitions.status: Immediate lane-local status carried by the appendix.
fieldDefinitions.standingClass: The lane-local standing classification attached to the appendix payload.
fieldDefinitions.nextLawfulAction: The next bounded action admitted by the lane at emission time.
fieldDefinitions.blockerSet: The active blocker or hold set attached to the appendix.
fieldDefinitions.milestone: The current bucket-local milestone or phase posture.
fieldDefinitions.triadRefs: Receipt, notice, and doping-header references that witness the appendix emission.
fieldDefinitions.continuityDisposition: Root-side continuity hint: reuse, successor, or break.
fieldDefinitions.successorReason: Optional explanation when a successor or break is lawful.

nonGoals: Permanent thread creation on every hourly run
Long-term archival of raw telemetry by default
Direct build admission from appendix transport alone
